title: RoPE — Rotary Position Embeddings
hint: rotary position embedding, complex number rotation, relative position, used in Llama, GPT-NeoX, Su et al 2021, arxiv 2104.09864

title: ALiBi — Attention with Linear Biases
hint: attention with linear biases, no positional embedding, length extrapolation, Press et al 2021, arxiv 2108.12409

title: RMSNorm
hint: root mean square layer normalization, simpler than LayerNorm, used in Llama, Zhang & Sennrich 2019, arxiv 1910.07467

title: SwiGLU & Gated Activations
hint: SwiGLU GeGLU gated linear units, replace ReLU/GELU in FFN, Shazeer 2020, arxiv 2002.05202

title: Mixture of Experts (MoE)
hint: sparse MoE, router top-k gating, Switch Transformer, GShard, Mixtral, DeepSeek-MoE, load balancing loss

title: Mamba & State Space Models
hint: SSM, S4, Mamba selective state space, linear scaling, Gu & Dao 2023, arxiv 2312.00752

title: GQA & MQA — Grouped/Multi-Query Attention
hint: grouped query attention, multi-query attention, KV cache reduction, Llama-2 70B, Ainslie et al 2023 arxiv 2305.13245, Shazeer 2019 arxiv 1911.02150

title: FlashAttention v1 / v2 / v3
hint: IO-aware exact attention, tiling, recomputation, Dao 2022 arxiv 2205.14135, Dao 2023 arxiv 2307.08691, FlashAttention-3 2024

title: Speculative Decoding
hint: draft model verifies with target model, 2-3x speedup, Leviathan et al 2022 arxiv 2211.17192, Chen et al DeepMind arxiv 2302.01318

title: vLLM & PagedAttention
hint: PagedAttention KV cache paging, continuous batching, Kwon et al 2023 arxiv 2309.06180

title: YaRN & Long Context RoPE Scaling
hint: YaRN, NTK-aware interpolation, position interpolation, extending context length, Peng et al 2023 arxiv 2309.00071

title: Scaling Laws — Kaplan & Chinchilla
hint: Kaplan et al 2020 arxiv 2001.08361, Hoffmann Chinchilla 2022 arxiv 2203.15556, compute-optimal training, N=20D rule

title: FSDP & ZeRO Sharding
hint: ZeRO 1/2/3, FSDP fully sharded data parallel, optimizer state sharding, Rajbhandari arxiv 1910.02054, PyTorch FSDP

title: Tensor & Pipeline Parallelism
hint: Megatron-LM tensor parallelism, GPipe pipeline parallelism, 3D parallelism, arxiv 1909.08053

title: Mixed Precision — bf16 / fp8
hint: fp16 vs bf16, loss scaling, fp8 H100, Micikevicius 2017 arxiv 1710.03740, transformer engine

title: μP — Maximal Update Parametrization
hint: Tensor Programs V, μ-Transfer, hyperparameter transfer across model sizes, Yang et al 2022 arxiv 2203.03466

title: DPO — Direct Preference Optimization
hint: Rafailov et al 2023 arxiv 2305.18290, no reward model, closed-form policy, replaces RLHF PPO

title: GRPO — Group Relative Policy Optimization
hint: DeepSeekMath GRPO, no value network, group baseline, Shao et al 2024 arxiv 2402.03300, used in DeepSeek-R1

title: Constitutional AI & RLAIF
hint: Anthropic CAI, RLAIF, AI feedback instead of human, harmlessness from AI, Bai et al 2022 arxiv 2212.08073

title: Instruction Tuning Datasets
hint: FLAN, T0, Alpaca, ShareGPT, Self-Instruct, OpenHermes, dataset quality > quantity, LIMA arxiv 2305.11206

title: ReAct & Tool-Using Agents
hint: ReAct reasoning + acting, Yao et al 2022 arxiv 2210.03629, tool use, function calling, agent loop

title: Reflexion & Self-Improvement
hint: Reflexion verbal RL, self-reflection memory, Shinn et al 2023 arxiv 2303.11366

title: Reasoning Models — o1, R1, Test-Time Compute
hint: OpenAI o1, DeepSeek-R1, chain of thought training, test-time compute scaling, RL on reasoning traces

title: Synthetic Data & Distillation
hint: synthetic data generation, distillation, Phi models, textbook quality, self-instruct, Orca, knowledge distillation Hinton 2015

title: Pretraining Data Curation
hint: FineWeb, RefinedWeb, dedup, MinHash, quality classifiers, C4, The Pile, Dolma

title: LLM Benchmarks Tour
hint: MMLU, GPQA, HumanEval, MATH, BBH, IFEval, MT-Bench, Chatbot Arena ELO, contamination

title: LLM-as-a-Judge
hint: MT-Bench, AlpacaEval, judge bias, Zheng et al 2023 arxiv 2306.05685, position bias, length bias

title: Mechanistic Interpretability
hint: induction heads, circuits, sparse autoencoders, Anthropic interpretability, Olah, transformer-circuits.pub

title: LLM Watermarking & Detection
hint: Kirchenbauer watermark arxiv 2301.10226, green list red list, AI text detection

title: Jailbreaks & Prompt Injection
hint: DAN, GCG attack arxiv 2307.15043, prompt injection, indirect injection, Greshake, OWASP LLM top 10
